client_construction.code: let (client, conn) = tokio_postgres::connect(database_url, NoTls).await?; tokio::spawn(async move { let _ = conn.await; });

primary_operations.name: save
primary_operations.sdk_call: self.client.execute("INSERT INTO orders (id, total) VALUES ($1, $2)", &[&id, &total]).await?; Ok(())

primary_operations.name: find_by_id
primary_operations.sdk_call: let row = self.client.query_opt("SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id=$1", &[&id]).await?; Ok(row.map(|r| r.get::<_, i64>(0)))

primary_operations.name: delete
primary_operations.sdk_call: self.client.execute("DELETE FROM orders WHERE id=$1", &[&id]).await?; Ok(())

code_style_notes: Connection future MUST be polled in a background task — without it, queries hang
NoTls is fine for tests; production should use rustls feature flag
